summary: AI and machine learning practitioner with hands-on experience building, evaluating, and iterating on AI systems including large language models, computer vision pipelines, and retrieval-augmented generation tools. Comfortable working independently with strong attention to detail in assessing model outputs, identifying failure cases, and structuring data for model improvement. Passionate about contributing to the full lifecycle of AI development from training data creation to evaluation and feedback.

skills.ml: LLM Evaluation, Prompt Engineering, LangChain, GPT-4o, Claude Sonnet/Haiku, DistilBERT, XGBoost, YOLO, HuggingFace, SHAP, Captum, RAG, Deepgram, OpenAI Embeddings, Pinecone
skills.infra: Docker, Kubernetes, GitHub Actions, Railway, Supabase, GCP, PostgreSQL

experience.title: Deep Learning Intern
bullets: Built a data augmentation pipeline using NumPy and Pandas, scaling the training dataset from a few hundred to 10,000+ images and manually re-annotating 500+ edge cases to improve label quality; accuracy improved from 65% to 85.4% on held-out evaluation data.

Developed a YOLO-based object detection model in Python to detect and classify industrial pipe inventory from warehouse images, improving accuracy by 30% and eliminating a fully manual counting process.
Designed normalized relational database schemas in SQL to store image metadata and inference results, enabling cross-team queries on model performance and inventory trends.
Containerized the model with Docker and deployed on Kubernetes for horizontal scaling of model inference, enabling the team to handle variable load without code changes.

projects.name: AI Interview Engine
projects.subtitle: Voice-First Candidate Screening Platform
projects.stack: Next.js, Express, Claude Sonnet/Haiku, Deepgram, Supabase, Railway, Vercel
bullets: Built an automated post-interview evaluation system scoring candidates across 4 dimensions with advance/hold/reject output, requiring careful definition of evaluation criteria and structured feedback generation from LLM responses.

Designed a multi-turn conversational AI engine with dynamic context injection: the LLM receives each candidate's parsed resume before the session and generates targeted, role-specific follow-up questions in real time.

Engineered a real-time voice pipeline integrating Deepgram Nova-2 (speech-to-text) and Aura (text-to-speech) with Claude Sonnet 4.6 (large language model), achieving 4-5s end-to-end latency per conversational turn and replacing human interviewers for initial candidate screening.

Built an automated document ingestion pipeline (PDF parsing, Claude Haiku, MD5 deduplication caching) and deployed full-stack on Railway, Vercel, and Supabase (PostgreSQL plus Row-Level Security plus Magic Link authentication) with Brevo SMTP for transactional email automation.

projects.name: CodeSyntax AI
projects.subtitle: Full-Stack RAG Developer Assistant
projects.stack: Python, FastAPI, Next.js, LangChain, Pinecone, Docker, GitHub Actions
bullets: Maintained a 55-question domain evaluation set to systematically measure model output quality and identify inconsistencies; implemented an LLM-based query intent classifier and result re-ranker by source authority, both measurably reducing off-topic responses.

Built a production retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) system using GPT-4o-mini with semantic search over Python Docs, RealPython, and StackOverflow, indexed in Pinecone via OpenAI vector embeddings.
Maintained 35+ pytest unit tests and a GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline that builds the Docker image and deploys to Railway (API) and Vercel (frontend) on every merge to main.

projects.name: AuthentiText
projects.subtitle: AI-Generated Text Detection Engine
projects.stack: Python, XGBoost, DistilBERT, HuggingFace, GCP, Docker
bullets: Conducted systematic model comparison across four architectures (Logistic Regression, Random Forest, XGBoost, DistilBERT) using ROC curves, confusion matrices, and SHAP feature importance to evaluate and explain model behavior; integrated Captum token-level attribution heatmaps for explainable AI (XAI).

Trained a weighted ensemble model combining XGBoost (21 hand-crafted linguistic features: perplexity, burstiness, lexical density) with a fine-tuned DistilBERT transformer, achieving 99.1% F1 and 99.96% AUROC on held-out test data.
Trained on the merged HC3 corpus spanning Wikipedia, Reddit, medicine, and finance domains; deployed as a publicly accessible machine learning inference app on HuggingFace Spaces.
